name: liqvia2
description: AI Treasury & Cash Flow Platform for SMEs

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @liqvia2/shared build && pnpm --filter @liqvia2/backend build && concurrently -n shared,app -c magenta,blue "pnpm --filter @liqvia2/shared exec tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "pnpm --filter @liqvia2/frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @liqvia2/shared build && pnpm --filter @liqvia2/backend build && pnpm --filter @liqvia2/frontend build && pnpm --filter @liqvia2/frontend build:server
